entry.title: Building the Future of Enterprise AI: MCP Servers and Agent-to-Agent Communication Revolution
entry.content:
Building the Future of Enterprise AI: MCP Servers and Agent-to-Agent Communication Revolution

Transforming how AI systems collaborate in modern enterprise environments

 

The enterprise AI landscape is experiencing a paradigm shift. While individual AI agents have proven their worth in specific domains, the real transformation happens when these intelligent systems can seamlessly collaborate, share knowledge, and coordinate complex workflows. Enter two revolutionary protocols that are reshaping how we think about AI integration: Model Context Protocol (MCP) and Agent-to-Agent Protocol (A2A).

The Integration Challenge: Breaking Down AI Silos

Picture this: You're managing an e-commerce platform with specialized AI agents for inventory management, fraud detection, customer recommendations, and order fulfillment. Each agent performs exceptionally within its domain, but when a customer wants to modify a large order that was flagged for unusual purchasing patterns while using a promotional code—suddenly your streamlined system becomes a coordination nightmare.

This scenario illustrates the fundamental challenge facing modern enterprises: AI agents operating in isolation. Without standardized communication protocols, organizations struggle with:

  • Integration Complexity: Each new AI tool requires custom integration work, consuming valuable development resources
  • Data Inconsistency: Different systems use varying data formats, leading to translation errors and processing delays
  • Workflow Fragmentation: Multi-step processes require manual intervention to bridge gaps between AI systems
  • Scalability Limitations: Adding new capabilities means exponentially more integration points to maintain

The result? Expensive, brittle AI implementations that fail to deliver their full potential.

Model Context Protocol (MCP): The Universal AI Language

 

Model Context Protocol addresses the first half of this challenge by creating a standardized way for AI applications to communicate with external systems and data sources. Developed by Anthropic, MCP serves as a universal translator that eliminates the need for custom integrations.

How MCP Transforms System Integration

Traditional AI integration requires developers to:

  • Learn each system's unique API structure
  • Handle different authentication methods
  • Parse varying data formats
  • Maintain separate codebases for each integration

MCP changes this by providing a unified interface that abstracts away system-specific complexities. Think of it as having a universal remote control that works with every device in your smart home, regardless of brand or model.

Core MCP Components

MCP Host: Acts as the central coordination hub, managing all communication between AI clients and external systems.

MCP Client: Represents your AI application that needs to access external resources or capabilities.

MCP Server: Exposes specific functionalities, data sources, or services in a standardized format that any MCP client can understand.

What MCP Servers Provide

Tools: Executable functions that AI agents can discover and use dynamically. For example, a customer service AI could discover and invoke tools for order lookup, refund processing, or inventory checking without needing pre-programmed knowledge of each system.

Resources: Access to both static and dynamic data sources. This might include real-time inventory levels, customer databases, product catalogs, or analytical reports—all accessible through a consistent interface.

Prompts: Reusable, parameterized templates that maintain consistency across different AI interactions while allowing for customization based on specific contexts.

Real-World MCP Benefits: E-commerce Transformation

Consider an online retailer implementing MCP across their AI ecosystem:

Before MCP: Their recommendation engine needed separate integrations with the inventory system, customer database, pricing engine, and analytics platform. Each integration required months of development and ongoing maintenance.

After MCP: The recommendation engine simply queries the MCP ecosystem for "customer profile," "available products," and "pricing data." The MCP servers handle all the complexity of connecting to underlying systems, transforming data formats, and managing authentication.

Result: Development time reduced from months to weeks, maintenance overhead decreased by 60%, and new AI capabilities can be added without touching existing integrations.

MCP's Business Impact

Accelerated Development: Teams can focus on AI logic rather than integration plumbing, reducing time-to-market for new AI features by up to 70%.

Enhanced Reliability: Standardized interfaces reduce integration bugs and improve system stability.

Future-Proofing: When underlying systems change, only the MCP server needs updating—all connected AI clients continue working without modification.

Cost Efficiency: Reduced integration complexity means lower development and maintenance costs, with some organizations reporting 50% savings on AI infrastructure expenses.

Agent-to-Agent Protocol (A2A): Orchestrating AI Collaboration

 

While MCP solves the AI-to-system challenge, Agent-to-Agent Protocol tackles the equally important problem of AI-to-AI communication. A2A enables different AI agents to discover, communicate, and coordinate with each other to handle complex, multi-step workflows.

The Multi-Agent Coordination Challenge

Modern business processes rarely fit within a single AI agent's capabilities. Consider a customer support scenario where a client reports a billing error on their account. This seemingly simple request actually requires coordination between:

  • Customer Service AI: To understand the query and manage the interaction
  • Billing System AI: To identify and analyze the billing discrepancy
  • Fraud Detection AI: To ensure the request isn't part of a fraudulent pattern
  • Account Management AI: To determine appropriate remediation steps

Without A2A, each handoff between agents requires manual intervention or custom integration work.

A2A's Coordination Framework

Dynamic Discovery: Agents can automatically discover other agents' capabilities through standardized "Agent Cards" that describe what each agent can do, what inputs it needs, and what outputs it provides.

Role-Based Organization: A2A defines clear roles—coordinators who manage workflows, specialists who handle specific tasks, and observers who monitor and provide insights.

Task Lifecycle Management: Every interaction follows a structured lifecycle from task creation through completion, with standardized status updates and error handling.

Flexible Communication: Agents can exchange various content types—text, images, structured data, or complex multimedia—through a unified messaging framework.

Transformative Healthcare Use Case

Let's explore how A2A revolutionizes healthcare coordination—a domain where precise, timely collaboration literally saves lives:

Scenario: A patient arrives at the emergency department with chest pain.

Traditional Approach:

  • Triage nurse manually enters patient data into multiple systems
  • Various specialists are paged individually
  • Lab orders are placed through separate systems
  • Results are manually communicated between departments
  • Treatment decisions involve multiple phone calls and consultations

A2A-Enabled Approach: The Emergency Coordinator Agent automatically orchestrates the entire process:

  1. Immediate Assessment: Delegates initial evaluation to the Triage AI, which processes symptoms and assigns priority
  2. Parallel Specialist Coordination: Simultaneously engages Cardiology AI for cardiac risk assessment, Lab AI for stat blood work orders, and Radiology AI for imaging protocols
  3. Real-Time Collaboration: As results become available, each specialist AI provides recommendations that are automatically integrated into a comprehensive assessment
  4. Coordinated Decision Making: The Treatment Planning AI synthesizes all inputs to recommend optimal care pathways
  5. Resource Optimization: Bed Management AI ensures appropriate room assignment while Pharmacy AI prepares necessary medications

Outcome: What traditionally took hours of coordination happens in minutes, with improved accuracy and reduced human error.

A2A's Healthcare Benefits

Reduced Response Times: Emergency protocols that previously required 30-45 minutes now complete in under 10 minutes.

Improved Accuracy: Standardized communication eliminates transcription errors and ensures all relevant information is considered.

Enhanced Care Quality: Parallel processing allows for more comprehensive evaluation without delays.

Resource Optimization: Intelligent coordination prevents resource conflicts and optimizes staff utilization.

Audit Trail: Every decision and communication is logged, providing complete visibility into care processes.

The Synergy: MCP + A2A = Enterprise AI Excellence

The true power emerges when MCP and A2A work together, creating an ecosystem where AI agents can seamlessly access any enterprise system while coordinating sophisticated workflows with other agents.

Manufacturing Excellence Example

Consider a smart manufacturing facility where quality control, predictive maintenance, supply chain, and production planning agents work together:

MCP Integration: Each agent accesses manufacturing data through standardized interfaces—production metrics, equipment sensors, inventory levels, and quality reports—without needing to understand the underlying industrial systems.

A2A Coordination: When the predictive maintenance agent detects potential equipment failure, it automatically:

  • Alerts the production planning agent to adjust schedules
  • Informs the supply chain agent to expedite replacement parts
  • Notifies the quality control agent to increase inspection frequency
  • Coordinates with the facility management agent to schedule maintenance windows

Result: Unplanned downtime reduced by 80%, maintenance costs decreased by 40%, and product quality improved through proactive interventions.

Financial Services Transformation

In banking, compliance, risk management, customer service, and fraud detection agents collaborate to provide comprehensive financial services:

Real-Time Risk Assessment: When a customer applies for a loan, the application automatically triggers parallel processing across multiple AI agents—credit analysis, fraud detection, regulatory compliance, and market risk assessment—with results synthesized in minutes rather than days.

Automated Compliance: Regulatory changes automatically propagate through the agent network, with each agent updating its decision-making criteria and reporting mechanisms without human intervention.

Enhanced Customer Experience: Customer service agents can instantly access comprehensive customer profiles while coordinating with specialized agents for investment advice, loan modifications, or dispute resolution.

Strategic Implementation Benefits

Organizational Advantages

Scalability Without Complexity: Adding new AI capabilities becomes as simple as plugging in new agents—the underlying infrastructure handles all communication and coordination automatically.

Reduced Technical Debt: Standardized protocols eliminate the accumulation of custom integrations that become expensive to maintain over time.

Faster Innovation: Teams can experiment with new AI agents without worrying about integration challenges, accelerating the pace of innovation.

Improved ROI: Organizations typically see 3x faster deployment of new AI capabilities and 60% reduction in integration costs.

Operational Excellence

Enhanced Reliability: Built-in error handling, circuit breakers, and failover mechanisms ensure system resilience even when individual components fail.

Better Visibility: Comprehensive monitoring and logging provide unprecedented insight into AI system performance and decision-making processes.

Simplified Management: Centralized configuration and monitoring reduce operational complexity while improving control over AI behaviors.

Compliance Readiness: Standardized audit trails and governance frameworks make it easier to meet regulatory requirements.

Addressing Implementation Challenges

Security and Trust Considerations

Authentication and Authorization: Both protocols include robust security frameworks to ensure only authorized agents can access specific resources or communicate with other agents.

Data Privacy: Built-in privacy controls protect sensitive information while enabling necessary collaboration between agents.

Audit and Compliance: Comprehensive logging and monitoring capabilities support regulatory requirements and internal governance policies.

Performance Optimization

Efficient Communication: Both protocols are designed for high-performance scenarios with minimal overhead and optimized message formats.

Load Balancing: Intelligent distribution of work across agent networks prevents bottlenecks and ensures optimal resource utilization.

Caching and Optimization: Smart caching mechanisms reduce redundant operations and improve overall system responsiveness.

Change Management

Gradual Adoption: Organizations can implement MCP and A2A incrementally, starting with high-value use cases and expanding over time.

Training and Education: Success requires investment in team education to help developers and administrators understand the new paradigms.

Cultural Shift: Moving from custom integrations to standardized protocols requires organizational commitment to new development approaches.

Future Outlook: The Evolution of AI Collaboration

Emerging Trends

Multi-Modal Communication: Next-generation implementations will support rich media communications, enabling agents to share images, video, audio, and complex data visualizations as part of their coordination efforts.

Federated Learning: Agents will be able to share and improve their models collaboratively while maintaining data privacy and security.

Self-Healing Networks: Advanced implementations will automatically detect and recover from failures, redistributing work and spawning replacement agents as needed.

Cross-Organization Collaboration: Future versions may enable secure collaboration between agents across organizational boundaries, creating industry-wide AI ecosystems.

Industry-Specific Evolution

Healthcare: Integration with medical devices, electronic health records, and regulatory systems will enable comprehensive patient care coordination.

Financial Services: Real-time market data integration and regulatory compliance automation will transform trading, lending, and risk management.

Manufacturing: Integration with IoT sensors, robotics, and supply chain systems will enable fully autonomous production optimization.

Retail: Seamless integration across online and offline channels will create truly omnichannel customer experiences.

Measuring Success: Key Performance Indicators

Technical Metrics

Integration Speed: Time to integrate new AI capabilities reduced from months to weeks

System Reliability: Uptime improvements of 99.9% or higher through robust error handling

Performance Optimization: Response time improvements of 40-60% through efficient communication protocols

Maintenance Reduction: 50-70% reduction in integration maintenance overhead

Business Metrics

Time to Market: Accelerated deployment of new AI features and capabilities

Cost Savings: Reduced development and maintenance costs through standardization

Innovation Velocity: Increased rate of AI experimentation and deployment

Competitive Advantage: Enhanced ability to respond quickly to market changes and opportunities

Getting Started: Practical Implementation Steps

Phase 1: Assessment and Planning

Current State Analysis: Evaluate existing AI implementations and identify integration pain points

Use Case Prioritization: Select high-value scenarios where MCP and A2A can deliver immediate benefits

Technical Readiness: Assess infrastructure and team capabilities for protocol implementation

Phase 2: Pilot Implementation

Limited Scope Deployment: Start with a single, well-defined use case to prove value and learn lessons

Performance Baseline: Establish metrics for comparing before and after implementation results

Team Training: Invest in education and skill development for development and operations teams

Phase 3: Scaled Deployment

Gradual Expansion: Systematically extend implementation to additional use cases and systems

Governance Framework: Establish policies and procedures for managing the expanded AI ecosystem

Continuous Optimization: Regular performance review and optimization of agent interactions and system performance

Conclusion: The Collaborative AI Future

The integration of Model Context Protocol and Agent-to-Agent Protocol represents a fundamental shift in how we architect and deploy enterprise AI systems. By standardizing communication between AI and enterprise systems (MCP) and enabling sophisticated coordination between AI agents (A2A), organizations can unlock the full potential of collaborative artificial intelligence.

The transformation is profound:

  • Development cycles shortened from months to weeks
  • Maintenance overhead reduced by 50-70%
  • System reliability improved to 99.9%+ uptime
  • Innovation velocity increased by 3x or more

The opportunity is immediate:

  • Protocols are mature and ready for enterprise deployment
  • Implementation can begin with high-value, low-risk pilot projects
  • Benefits compound as more agents and systems join the ecosystem

The competitive advantage is significant:

  • Organizations that adopt these protocols will be able to deploy AI capabilities faster and more reliably than competitors
  • The ability to coordinate complex, multi-agent workflows will become a key differentiator
  • Standardized approaches will enable innovation at unprecedented scale

Whether you're in healthcare, finance, manufacturing, or retail, MCP and A2A provide the foundation for building sophisticated, resilient, and scalable AI ecosystems that can transform how your organization operates and competes.

The future of enterprise AI isn't about individual agents working in isolation—it's about orchestrated networks of specialized agents working together seamlessly to deliver exceptional business outcomes. Start your journey toward collaborative AI excellence today.

Key Resources:

  • Strategic Planning: Begin with a comprehensive assessment of your current AI landscape and identify high-value integration opportunities
  • Technical Implementation: Consider partnering with experienced system integrators who understand both protocols
  • Change Management: Invest in team education and organizational change management to ensure successful adoption
  • Continuous Improvement: Plan for ongoing optimization and expansion of your collaborative AI ecosystem

entry.title: Hello SAP Community! I am Padala Sai Lokesh
entry.content:
SAP TechEd is one of the biggest technology events where developers, consultants, students, and industry experts come together to explore the latest innovations in the SAP ecosystem. Attending this event helped me understand how technologies like SAP S/4HANA, AI, Cloud, and SAP Business Technology Platform are shaping the future of enterprise solutions.

Meeting the SAP TechEd mascot and exploring the SAP Community area during the event.

 

This was a fun moment during the event where I got the chance to interact with the SAP TechEd mascot and explore the SAP Community area. The environment was full of energy with students, developers, and professionals discussing new technologies.

Exploring partner technology Microsoft booth and interacting with industry professionals.

 

At SAP TechEd, there were several partner booths where companies showcased their technologies and innovations. Visiting these booths helped me learn how different companies collaborate with SAP to build powerful enterprise solutions.

Participating in a hands-on learning session at SAP TechEd.

One of the most exciting parts of SAP TechEd was the hands-on learning sessions. These sessions allowed participants to practice real SAP technologies and gain practical experience with modern tools and platforms.

It was a great opportunity to learn directly from experts and understand how SAP solutions work in real business scenarios.

Learning about SAP’s AI innovations  "Joule".

Another interesting part of the event was learning about Joule, SAP’s AI copilot designed to enhance productivity and assist users in enterprise applications. Seeing how AI is integrated into SAP systems was very inspiring and showed the direction in which enterprise technology is evolving.

Key Takeaways from SAP TechEd

Here are some of the key insights I gained from attending the event:

• SAP is strongly moving towards cloud-based enterprise solutions
• Artificial Intelligence and automation will play a major role in enterprise software
• SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) is becoming a central platform for innovation
• Continuous learning and community engagement are very important for building a successful career in SAP

 

Conclusion

Attending SAP TechEd was a truly inspiring experience for me. It gave me the opportunity to learn from industry experts, explore new technologies, and connect with the global SAP community.

This event motivated me to continue learning SAP technologies and build a career in the SAP ecosystem.

 

And now let’s hear from you!

Have you ever attended SAP TechEd?

What was your experience, and what did you learn from the event?

Feel free to share your thoughts in the comments. I would love to learn from the SAP Community!

entry.title: Hello SAP Community! My name is Sahana.N and I’m excited to start my journey
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community!

My name is Sahana N, a Mechanical Engineering student at REVA University in Bangalore, India.

 

With a strong foundation in engineering principles, I'm eager to blend my technical skills with enterprise software solutions. I'm thrilled to be part of the Hello SAP Community initiative. I think it is an ideal platform for a beginner like me to explore the vast SAP universe, ask questions, and learn from experienced professionals across the globe. Through this community, I hope to learn from real-world experts, uncover practical applications, exchange ideas, and build a global professional network that supports my career growth

As a student, I’m curious about learning new technologies and eager to understand how SAP solutions help businesses run more efficiently. Through this community, I hope to gain insights from experts, discover fresh ideas, and grow my professional network.

I look forward to sharing my learning journey and contributing to the SAP Community in meaningful ways in the future.

Here are some exciting questions I've chosen to answer as a part of the Hello SAP Community initiative;

1)What is your hobby?

My hobbies keep me energized and well-rounded. One of my hobbies is exploring new technologies and learning about innovations in engineering, I love travelling to new places and exploring the rich cultures of different countries, Reading books-especially on professional development and personal development, I enjoy painting , singing soulful melodies, and dancing to stay active.

 

 2)Where do you see yourself in 5 years ?

In the next five years, I see myself growing into a skilled technology professional with both strong technical knowledge and practical, hands‑on experience. I want to work on real‑world projects that challenge me, help me keep learning, and allow me to continuously improve my expertise. My goal is not only to build my career but also to contribute positively to my organization and the wider technology community.

3)Which 5 things do you absolutely want to achieve in life?

  • Build a successful career in technology and engineering.
  • Keep learning and improving myself.
  • Work on projects that create real-world impact.
  • Build meaningful connections and collaborate with talented people.
  • I want to inspire others through my journey, share knowledge, and give back to the community, while also nurturing my personal well-being.

4) What is your professional life dream?

My dream is to build a successful career in technology and engineering. I want to master new skills, develop innovative solutions that boost organizational efficiency, and contribute to the global tech community.

5)What is the best lesson your parents taught you?

The best lesson from my parents is the power of hard work, honesty, and patience. They taught me to stay focused on my goals and persevere through challenges-values that guide my education and career. They taught me not to let go of my Ethics and values in times where I face difficulty and hardship and to always withhold my principles. 

My Experience at SAP TechEd Bangalore.

Recently, I had the opportunity to attend SAP TechEd Bangalore, and it was an amazing learning experience for me. As a student interested in technology and innovation, being part of such a global tech event was truly inspiring. One of the most exciting parts of the event was exploring the Demo Pods, where SAP experts explained different technologies and solutions. It was great to see how SAP technologies like BTP are used to solve real-world business problems.

A Great Learning at SAP TechEd with my friends

 

Key Takeaways from the event.

Generative AI is essential now – Tools like SAP Joule show that AI isn’t just an add-on anymore; it’s becoming the core of productivity and automation.

Data drives sustainability – Using BTP for ESG reporting shows how data can turn sustainability goals into real, measurable impact.

Across every theme at TechEd, Al, automation, integration, and developer enablement, one thing stood out: data readiness is the true enabler of transformation. Without it, even the most advanced tools can't deliver their full value.

 

 I had the wonderful opportunity to attend SAP TechEd Bangalore along with friends from my college. It was a great experience for all of us to be part of such a global technology event. Our college group explored different sessions, demo pods, and interacted with SAP experts. We also had the chance to connect with members of the SAP Community and learn about new technologies like SAP BTP, AI, and cloud innovations.

Now, I would like to finish the post by asking you all a question which you're invited to answer in the comments section:

What is a "mind-blowing" and fascinating  technology you expect to be mainstream by 2030??
“I’d love to hear your voice in this conversation—share your ideas, insights, or predictions in the comments. Your perspectives will enrich this dialogue, and I’m genuinely excited to learn from the thoughts you bring to the table.”

#HelloSAPcommunity#SAPCommunity#SAPLearning#SAPecosytem#SAPworld#Techcommunity#SAPforbegginers#FuturewithSAP#Learningneverstops

entry.title: Hello SAP Community! My name is Chandu .v and I'm excited to start my journey
entry.content:
My name is Chandu. V and I'm currently pursuing my bachelor's degree in mechanical engineering at REVA University, Bangalore, India.

 

 

I’m really excited to be part of the Hello SAP Community initiative. For me, it’s not just about learning—it’s about connecting with people, exploring new ideas, and growing together.

I’m curious about how technology solves real-world problems, and I’m especially interested in how SAP helps organizations run more efficiently. I’m always eager to learn and improve my skills.

Through this community, I hope to learn from others, share my journey, and contribute along the way.

Thank you, SAP Community, for this opportunity—I’m looking forward to the journey ahead!

Here are a few questions I’ve chosen to answer as part of the  Hello SAP Community initiative:

1. What is your professional life dream?
My dream is to build a meaningful career in technology where I can solve real-world problems and keep growing as a professional while creating value for others.

2. Where do you see yourself in 5 years?
In five years, I see myself as a skilled and confident professional, working on impactful projects and continuously improving my knowledge.

3. What is your hobby?
I enjoy exploring new technologies, reading, and learning through online platforms to stay updated and grow.

4. Which five things do you want to achieve in life?

  • Build a successful and purposeful career
  • Keep learning and improving myself
  • Contribute to society through my work
  • Make a positive impact in technology
  • Inspire others through my journey

5. What is the best lesson your parents taught you?
They taught me the value of hard work, honesty, and staying strong during challenges—lessons that guide me every day.

My SAP TechEd Bangalore 2025

SAP TechEd Bangalore 2025 was a truly inspiring experience for me. It was exciting to learn about SAP’s AI-driven future while being part of such a vibrant global tech community. The experience motivated me even more to keep learning and growing in my journey as a technology professional.

 

SAP TechEd Bangalore – A Great Learning Experience with My College Team:

Attending SAP TechEd Bangalore with my college friends was a really inspiring experience. We explored different sessions, checked out demo pods, and interacted with SAP experts, which gave me great exposure as a student.

One of the highlights for me was the demo pods, where I got to see how SAP BTP is used in real-world scenarios to solve business challenges. It made everything feel more practical and exciting.

 

 

Key Takeaways:

  • Generative AI is playing a big role in making processes smarter and more efficient.
  • The Clean Core approach helps systems stay flexible and future-ready.
  • Technology is also driving sustainability through better, data-driven decisions.
  • A cloud-first mindset is speeding up digital transformation.
  • Integration is key to connecting systems and ensuring smooth operations.

 

The Best Part of SAP TechEd

The best part of SAP TechEd 2025 for me was being part of such an energetic and inspiring community. More than the announcements, I really enjoyed the hands-on learning and seeing how AI and data are used in real-world scenarios.

Connecting with others, sharing ideas, and experiencing that positive energy made it truly memorable.

 

 

Overall, this event was more than just an experience—it really motivated me to keep learning and growing in the SAP ecosystem. It gave me a new perspective, boosted my confidence, and encouraged me to take on new challenges.

It truly inspired me to aim higher and contribute in a meaningful way to the world of technology.

 

“Now it’s your turn!
Which technology excites you the most right now, and why?
I would love to hear your thoughts as well.

entry.title: Серія вебінарів у квітні
entry.content:
Ми зібрали добірку глобальних вебінарів від SAP на квітень — для тих, хто хоче глибше зануритись у хмарну трансформацію, AI, інтеграцію, управління даними та бізнес-процеси.

Від практичних deep-dive сесій до розмов з топ-експертами SAP — обирайте найцікавіші для вас сесії та реєструйтесь за лінками нижче.

⌚Час вказано за Києвом. Мова вебінарів — англійська.

SAP Cloud ERP — трансформація, інновації та AI

  • 7 квітня, 15:00 -16:00
    Understanding SAP Cloud ERP: Public Cloud Concepts &   Operating Model 
    Основи SAP Cloud ERP, її модель операцій в публічній хмарі, клієнтські приклади та модель безпеки.

  • 13 квітня, 10:00 - 11:00
    In-Depth with SAP Cloud ERP ERP HY1 - AI Innovations in Supply Chain Management
    Глибоке занурення в AI-можливості SAP Cloud ERP для Supply Chain. Огляд 5 сценаріїв використання: обробка сертифікатів якості (SAP Document AI), управління відставанням замовлень (SAP Joule), агент планування виробництва, створення сповіщень про технічне обслуговування та обробка надходження товарів — з демонстрацією системи та сесією Q&A.

  • 14 квітня, 15:00 -16:00
    Innovation, End to End Scope, and Standard Business Processes
    Огляд ERP, зокрема фінанси, закупівлі та продажі, найкращі E2E бізнес-процеси в SAP Cloud ERP, а також питання конфігурації та стандартизації. Як використання гнучкості допомагає в диференціації та як послідовність процесів може прискорити впровадження.

  • 16 квітня, 12:00 - 12:30
    Clean core. Upgrade ready. Built to innovate. Maximizing value with SAP Cloud ERP Private
    Як clean core стратегія допомагає ERP-системам адаптуватися швидше, впроваджувати ШІ та знижувати витрати на оновлення. Досвід Cimpress та Nippon Gases Europe.

  • 21 квітня, 15:00 -16:00
    Transforming to SAP Cloud ERP: Mindset, Method, and Momentum
    Найкращі практики для трансформаційних проектів, огляд SAP Activate для SAP Cloud ERP у публічній хмарі, аспекти міграції даних та управління змінами у стандартному хмарному середовищі. Поширені помилки та найбільш ефективні підходи.
    Спікер: Sadik Tekin, керівник взаємодії з клієнтами - SAP Cloud ERP.

  • 28 квітня, 15:00 -16:00
    SAP Business AI in SAP Cloud ERP
    Як SAP Business AI інтегровано в SAP Cloud ERP для забезпечення надійних прогнозних інсайтів, інтелектуальної автоматизації та контекстуальних рекомендацій в основних бізнес-процесах. Крім того, будемо розглядати поширені випадки використання AI в SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

SAP Business Data Cloud – Наступна ера бізнес-даних

  • 16 квітня, 17:00 - 18:00
    Breaking Down the SAP BDC Pricing Model
    Огляд метрик споживання SAP Business Data Cloud та інструмента SAP BDC Capacity Unit Estimator для обчислення потреб у ємнісних одиницях. Також буде представлена інформація з SAP for Me, яка допоможе зрозуміти, як отримати доступ до важливих даних для підписки та операційних рішень.

SAP BTP: архітектура, AI та управління хмарою

  • 14 квітня, 17:00 - 18:00
    Architect the Future: SAP BTP AI Best Practices: From Strategy to Implementation
    Функціональна та технічна реалізація AI на SAP Business Technology Platform, важливість цих практик, структуру для AI-випадків та релевантні шаблони для проектів. Проєктування, побудова та масштабування AI-рішень на SAP BTP з реальним бізнес-впливом.

  • 15 квітня, 14:30 - 15:30
    Transformation with Agentic Enterprise Automation
    Як SAP BTP та SAP Business Transformation Management разом забезпечують масштабну автоматизацію підприємства на базі ШІ. Дізнайтесь, як проектувати та керувати ШІ-агентами, вимірювати їх цінність і перейти від точкової автоматизації до наскрізної інтелектуальної трансформації процесів — з реальними прикладами.

  • 21 квітня, 16:00 - 17:00
    Govern your cloud deliveries with SAP Cloud ALM and SAP Cloud Transport Management.
    Останні покращення в SAP Cloud ALM та SAP Cloud Transport Management Service. Можливість редагування транспортних запитів у BTP, що дозволяє динамічно налаштовувати транспорти в режимі реального часу. 

  • 23 квітня, 16:00 - 17:00
    Inside SAP IT: How to Lead IT Through Constant Change – a talk with SAP’s CPIO Benni Blau
    Розмова з Dr. Benjamin Blau, Chief Process and Information Officer SAP: як SAP IT управляє одним з найскладніших технологічних ландшафтів у світі, що означає роль Customer Zero та як агентний ШІ змінює роботу IT. Без сценарію. Зсередини.

  • 28 квітня, 16:00 - 17:00
    SAP Cloud ALM for SAP BTP Operations - Latest news!
    Як SAP Cloud ALM for Operations покращує роботу SAP Business Technology Platform. Огляд та аналіз підтримки SAP BTP. Новини про стратегію та плани на майбутнє. 

Інтеграція

  • 23  квітня, 17:30 - 19:00
    Achieve Enterprise-grade Operations for SAP Integration Suite
    Сесія охоплює операційні моделі, управління та стандартизовані практики експлуатації SAP Integration Suite: централізований моніторинг, варіанти розгортання, автоматизоване управління та DevOps-механізми. Для архітекторів інтеграцій, власників платформ та операційних команд.

  • 28 квітня, 9:30 - 11:00
    Develop enterprise-grade AI Agents with SAP Build and SAP Integration Suite
    Як SAP Build та SAP Integration Suite разом забезпечують наскрізну агентну автоматизацію в SAP та не-SAP середовищах. Дізнайтесь, як поєднати low-code розробку з корпоративною інтеграцією для побудови надійних автоматизацій під управлінням ШІ-агентів. Жива демонстрація та реальні приклади клієнтів включені.

  • 28 квітня, 17:00 - 18:00
    SAP Integration Suite - Monthly Update April
    Дізнайтесь про оновлення SAP Integration Suite — iPaaS платформи для з'єднання хмарних та локальних процесів, застосунків і даних. У програмі: оновлення B2B, нові можливості Edge Integration Cell (файловий адаптер, OFTP2, хмарний конектор) та презентація нової розширеної редакції Enhanced Edition. А також — #AskAnythingIntegration сесія запитань та відповідей з експертами.

Процеси та трансформація з SAP Signavio

  • 23 квітня, 16:00 - 17:00
    Turning business transformation into a capability for competitive advantage: from fragmented initiatives to repeatable success
    Як подолати проблеми масштабування трансформацій та перетворити їх на конкурентну перевагу. Оцінка зрілості процесів: визначте прогалини в стратегії, процесах, даних і культурі за допомогою досвіду 1,000 лідерів. Створіть систему для вимірюваних результатів, швидшого впровадження та інновацій.

Підтримка, сервіс та розвиток

  • 7 квітня, 16:00 - 17:00
    Customer Interaction Center (CIC) Support SAP for Me: SAP for Me Release Updates Q1 2026
    Щоквартальний вебкаст про останні оновлення та нові функції SAP for Me. Огляд змін з попереднього релізу, поточні проєкти та збір відгуків від учасників. 

  • 14 квітня, 16:00 - 17:00
    SAP's new Service Portfolio - Unleash your full potential with Success Plans
    Як Success Plans допомагають максимізувати цінність ваших SAP-рішень через персоналізовану підтримку та безперервний розвиток.

  • 15 квітня, 11:00 - 12:00
    Global HR, Local Compliance - Unlocking Localization in SAP SuccessFactors
    Як SAP SuccessFactors поєднує стандартизовані глобальні HR-процеси з локальними регуляторними вимогами. Локалізовані версії для розрахунку зарплати, управління часом та core HR, понад 800 законодавчих оновлень на рік. Завершення — жива сесія Q&A.

  • 15 квітня, 16:00 - 17:00
    Unlocking Transformative Value with the Advanced Success Plan
    Дізнайтесь, як Advanced Success Plan допомагає повністю розкрити потенціал ваших SAP-рішень та досягти вимірюваних бізнес-результатів.

  • 16 квітня, 16:00 - 17:00
    Achieving Strategic Excellence with the Max Success Plan
    Стратегічне партнерство та підтримка виділених експертів: наскрізний консалтинг для оцінки нових можливостей, управління складними трансформаціями та досягнення конкурентної переваги.

Переходьте за посиланнями, реєструйтесь та додавайте події до календаря — квітень це чудова можливість прокачати знання, отримати інсайти від експертів та бути в курсі найновіших рішень SAP.

entry.title: SAP Community Voice: AI into UI5, SAP Sapphire tips and New Enhancements based on your feedback!
entry.content:
April has just started, and with the new season comes some very exciting news for our SAP Community!

From practical ways to bring AI directly into SAPUI5 and automate deployments in SAP Integration Suite, to ETL best practices in SAP Datasphere, there’s a lot to explore in today’s edition. And, beyond the technical side, we also have announcements about new SAP Community website enhancements. Spoiler: most of these updates were shaped by your feedback, so we’re sure you will appreciate them!

Need tips on building your SAP Sapphire agenda? Or looking for recommendations on local SAP community meetups? We’ve got you covered with a full list of upcoming April events happening around the world.

Let’s dive in!

Featured Blog Posts 

AI into SAPUI5 as reusable controls 

SAP Mentor Wouter Lemaire, published a very interesting approach in his latest blog post, exploring how AI can be embedded directly into SAPUI5 controls through a reusable library. Instead of focusing on complex AI agents, he brings AI closer to where users interact daily, enabling simple tasks like text improvement, translation, or spell checking directly inside UI5 apps using standard data binding-without requiring developers to manage AI infrastructure. The post walks through the available controls, architecture, and design decisions, showing how this lightweight and practical approach can make AI integration more accessible and effective for everyday SAP use cases. 

Read Wouter Blog post here 

UI5 Plugins for Claude 

SAP Product and Topic Expert Florian Vogt introduced the new UI5 plugins for Claude and how to bring AI-powered development directly into SAPUI5 and OpenUI5 workflows. Designed to enhance developer productivity, these open-source plugins enable Claude Code to understand UI5-specific patterns, APIs, and best practices providing more accurate and context-aware assistance without relying on generic AI knowledge. The initial release includes a plugin for general UI5 development support, and another focused on TypeScript migration, helping developers create projects, fix errors, and modernize applications with confidence. If you're working with UI5 and exploring AI-assisted development, this is definitely one to check out. 

Read Florian Blog post here  

SAP Integration Suite automatic deployments using Ansible 

In this practical blog post, SAP Community member Marian Vatafu shared how to automate deployments in SAP Integration Suite using Ansible, reducing manual effort and minimizing human errors across environments. By defining deployment steps once in a YAML instruction file, developers can automatically handle tasks like credential creation, certificate management, artifact deployment, and configuration updates across DEV to PROD. The solution integrates tools like ServiceNow, GitHub, and Jenkins to ensure full traceability, auditability, and secure handling of sensitive data through Ansible Vault. With this approach, teams can streamline operations, improve consistency, and confidently manage complex integration landscapes with significantly less manual work.  

Read Marian Blog post here  

SAP Datasphere: Extract, Transform & Load (ETL)   

SAP Product and Topic Expert Jeet Kapase shared in his last blog post a guide on best practices for implementing ETL (Extract, Transform & Load) processes in SAP Datasphere, helping data engineers choose the right approach based on performance, scalability, and business needs. The post breaks down the available features-such as Replication Flow, Transformation Flow, Data Flow, and Open SQL Procedures, and explains when to use each one, highlighting SAP's recommendation to prioritize Replication and Transformation Flows for most scenarios. With clear comparisons, real performance insights, and practical guidance, this is a valuable read for anyone looking to design efficient, future-ready data pipelines in SAP Datasphere. 

Read Jeet Blog post here 

Community News 

SAP Community Enhancements  

April started with great news for our SAP Community users, as we have just launched new enhancements to make the experience navigating even better. 

  • Dark Mode:   Dark Mode is now live as the Beta Phase is complete! Last year, after listening to your feedback, we launched Dark Mode in beta, giving you the chance to choose your preferred visual experience. Since then, you have shared suggestions on how to make this feature more polished and seamless. With that in mind, we are happy to introduce the following improvements:

1. Light/Dark Mode Toggle -  A new toggle replaces the temporary text-based switch, making it easier to switch between themes for a more personalized browsing experience. 

2. Dark Mode Improvements for DSA Reporting Form -  The "Report Inappropriate Content" form has been updated to ensure all table content is visible and readable in dark mode. Previously unreadable white-on-white elements now follow the correct dark theme styling. 

 

  • Improved Recent Activity Filters: Now the Recent Activity feed filters on the Community landing page (Most Viewed, Most Commented, Most Liked) show results from the last 30 days, making content discovery more relevant. When you filter for most commented, for example, it only shows the most commented posts from the last 30 days. This makes it nicer and easier to find relevant content. 

 

  • Removal of ‘Users Online’ Homepage Stats: The “Online Members” statistic has been removed from the homepage to simplify the layout and reduce noise, helping users focus on key community conte

Before:

After:

Events 

SAP Sapphire 2026 

Are you planning to attend the SAP Sapphire 2026? This huge event is where SAP makes big announcements about its vision for the future of ERP and business applications. This includes showing new products, presenting customers who have transformed their business using SAP’s solutions, and highlighting new technologies that will shape the future. With so many great speakers and topics, choosing the sessions to attend sometimes can be overwhelming. To help you, SAP Product and Topic Expert Peter Spielvogel, published a blog post with his AI and UX sessions agenda selections. We highly recommend checking out, because he shared a very diverse agenda with an amazing selection of speakers! 

Read Peter Blog post here  

April upcoming Events: 

Talking about planning, have you selected any community driven events to attend this month? Any meetups with your local SAP community group?  In case not, we have got you covered! 

Check the list of the events that are already available on our Events page for you to sign up. There are opportunities all over the world: 

 SAP Stammtisch Wien - 09.04.2026 - SAP Community 

SAP Inside Track Campinas - 11.04.2026 - SAP Community 

SAP Meetup at UATE- 15.04.2026 - SAP Community 

Katowice - SAP Stammtisch 15.04.2026 - SAP Community 

SAP Community Meetup Lisbon - 16.04.2026- SAP Community 

SAP Inside Track Madrid 2026 - 17.04. 2026 - SAP Community 

SAP Stammtisch Wroclaw - 17.04.2026 - SAP Community 

Networking Meetup Dublin - 21.04.2026 - SAP Community 

Basel-Freiburg Stammtisch - 23.04.2026 - SAP Community 

SAP Women Walk & Talk São Paulo- 25.04.2026 - SAP Community

entry.title: Hello SAP Community! My name is Appikatla Venkata Murali Krishna
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community!

My name is Appikatla Venkata Murali krishna, and I am currently an aspiring SAP MM Consultant. I have completed my studies and have been actively building my skills in SAP S/4HANA with a focus on Materials Management (MM).

I have worked on real-time scenarios like procurement processes, freight vendor integration, and inventory management, which helped me understand how businesses manage materials efficiently using SAP. I am passionate about learning new SAP technologies and improving my functional knowledge to grow in this field.

As part of the Hello SAP Community Initiative, I’m excited to share my experience. You can read more about the initiative in Hello SAP Community Initiative , which gives the full background and context.

What is your professional life dream?

My professional dream is to become a successful SAP MM Consultant working on global implementation projects. I aim to contribute to organizations by optimizing procurement processes and improving supply chain efficiency using SAP solutions.

What do you imagine is the future of your topic (SAP, AI, Cloud)?

I believe the future of SAP lies in AI and Cloud integration. SAP S/4HANA Cloud combined with AI will automate procurement, predict demand, and optimize supply chains. As an SAP MM professional, I am excited to be part of this transformation.

What is your hobby?

My hobbies include learning new technologies, exploring SAP scenarios, and improving my technical knowledge. I also enjoy watching tech-related content and staying updated with industry trends.

What was the most fun project you ever participated in and why?

One of the most interesting projects I worked on was Freight Vendor Integration in SAP MM. In this project, I learned how to configure condition types like FRB1, manage multiple vendors (material and freight), and handle invoice verification. It was fun because it connected real-world logistics with SAP configuration.

What do you enjoy most in your studies/work and why?

What I enjoy most is understanding real-time business processes and configuring them in SAP. It is exciting to see how a business requirement is translated into a system solution. Especially in SAP MM, I enjoy working on purchase orders, inventory, and vendor management.

My SAP TechEd Bangalore Experience

This year, I had the opportunity to attend SAP TechEd Bangalore 2025, which was an amazing learning experience for me. It was my first time participating in such a large SAP event, and it gave me exposure to the latest innovations in the SAP ecosystem.

During the event, I attended multiple sessions related to SAP S/4HANA, AI integration, and cloud technologies. I also explored how SAP is transforming business processes using intelligent technologies.

One of the best parts of TechEd was the opportunity to connect with SAP experts, professionals, and fellow learners. It helped me understand real-world industry expectations and motivated me to improve my skills further.

Overall, SAP TechEd was an inspiring experience that strengthened my interest in SAP and gave me clarity about my career path.

And now let’s hear from you!

Where do you see yourself in 5 years?

I would love to hear your thoughts and experiences please share them in the comments!

entry.title: Somos Comunidade SAP Curitiba – Fabiele Boico
entry.content:
Este post faz parte da série  “Somos SAP Community Curitiba”, criada para compartilhar histórias de pessoas que ajudam a construir e fortalecer o ecossistema SAP em nossa cidade.

A ideia da série foi apresentada neste post de abertura:  Introdução - Série da comunidade: Somos SAP Community Curitiba

A proposta é simples: responder algumas perguntas e contar um pouco da nossa jornada dentro da comunidade.

Fui convidada por @SimoneAzevedo para participar da série e compartilhar um pouco da minha jornada no ecossistema SAP. Você pode conferir o post dela aqui:  Somos SAP Community Curitiba – Simone Azevedo - SAP Community   


🚀Quem sou eu na Comunidade SAP Curitiba?

Eu sou aquela que 'deu o match' perfeito com a Simone e acabou sendo fisgada por esse ecossistema fantástico! Brincadeiras à parte, hoje atuo como Head de Marketing na CVA . Entrei na comunidade de mansinho e acabei virando fã de carteirinha (e patrocinadora oficial em nome da CVA!). Estar presente em eventos como o SAP Inside Track Curitiba e o SAP Talk Women foi um divisor de águas; não foi apenas marketing, foi um 'achado' que já faz parte da história oficial da CVA. Estamos em casa!

❤️O que mais me motiva a continuar fazendo parte da SAP Community Curitiba?

O que me mantém aqui é uma troca real . No marketing, falamos muito sobre conexões, mas aqui na SAP Community a gente vive isso na prática. É a energia de compartilhar conhecimento, as conversas de corredor que viram insights valiosos e, claro, ver que sempre tem alguém disposto a ajudar. É impossível não querer voltar para o próximo evento!

✨Como fazer parte da comunidade impactou minha jornada profissional ou pessoal?

Profissionalmente, você ganha uma visibilidade incrível e um reconhecimento que só uma comunidade unida proporciona. Pessoalmente? Tem sido um deslumbre! Eu vim de outras áreas e, para mim, o ‘universo SAP’ ainda brilha como novidade. Me sinto em um eterno aprendizado com brilho nos olhos. Sou imensamente grata por esse recomeço e por ter mentores e parceiros de jornada como o Juliano Kisielewicz, o Jean Struck , o Rodrigo Okita Yamamoto e o Edson Alves . Sem eles, essa aventura não seria tão rica!

SAP Inside Track 2025 - Time CVASAP Talk Women 2026

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

❓Que conselho você daria para quem está começando agora no ecossistema SAP e ainda não conhece a comunidade?

Não tenha medo do novo. O ecossistema SAP é gigante, mas a comunidade Curitiba é o quintal onde a gente aprende a jogar junto. Venha pelo conhecimento, fique pelas pessoas!

🌐Conecte-se comigo:  https://www.linkedin.com/in/fabiele-cristine-boico-2473a529/

 

💫Convidados para continuar a série


Para continuar a série Somos SAP Community Curitiba, convido:  @Ironcva2025, @Lucas_Alberto e @Asafe_Ferraz-00 para compartilharem suas história e experiências na comunidade.

Além das perguntas da série:
1.  Quem sou eu na SAP Community Curitiba?
2.  O que mais me motiva a continuar fazendo parte do SAP Community Curitiba?
3.  Como fazer parte da comunidade impactou minha jornada profissional ou pessoal?

Deixo também a pergunta adicional: 

Que conselho você daria para alguém que está começando agora no ecossistema SAP e ainda não conhece a comunidade?

 

Frase final

E assim sigo, com o coração grato e a mentalidade sempre pronto para o próximo evento. A Simone abriu as portas, eu entrei com tudo, e agora quero saber: quem é o próximo a contar sua história? ✨

 

#SomosSAPCommunityCWB
#SAPCommunityCWB
#SAPCommunity

entry.title: SAP Developer News for April 9th, 2026
entry.content:
ITEMS 

Code Connect event tickets available from 16 Apr 

  • Code Connect website https://code-connect.dev/ 

On-location update from the SAP CodeJam Roadshow in Brazil 

  • SAP CodeJam Roadshow 2026 - Brazil edition (blog post) https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam-blog-posts/sap-codejam-roadshow-2026-brazil-edition-kicking-off-in-march-and/ba-p/14317926  

SAPUI5 news - "The Art and Science of SAPUI5 in SAP Build" on 15 Apr plus Road Map updates 

  • Event information https://learning.sap.com/live-sessions/the-art-and-science-of-sapui5-in-sap-build 
  • Road Map info https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73554900100800001361&range=CURRENT-LAST#Q2%202026  

New Expert Session series on CAP Node.js with Daniel Schlachter 

  • Expert session series playlist https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6RpkC85SLQDxW_6INTtprrvZ3WiXT8u5 

DYK #11 - AI agents (Generative AI Hub & LangGraph) 

  • CrewAI example connecting to Sap Generative AI Hub via LiteLLM https://sap-contributions.github.io/litellm-agentic-examples/_notebooks/examples/crewai_litellm_lib.html  

CHAPTER TITLES  

00:00 Intro 
00:07 Code Connect event tickets available from 16 Apr 
01:01 On-location update from the SAP CodeJam Roadshow in Brazil 
01:54 SAPUI5 news - “The Art and Science of SAPUI5 in SAP Build" on 15 Apr plus Road Map updates 
02:42 New Expert Session series on CAP Node.js with Daniel Schlachter 
03:22 DYK #11 - AI agents (Generative AI Hub & LangGraph) 

TRANSCRIPT

This is the SAP Developer
News for April 9th, 2026.

[DJ]
The number one developer event annually is coming up soon in the SAP calendar. That's Code Connect. It's in July, but the tickets for all the events within Code Connect go on sale on the 16th of April. That's coming up very soon. so that's tickets for the CodeJams and also the individual conferences so there are four CodeJams all together OpenUI5, CAP AI Agents and HANA AI and there's UI5con of course reCAP and HANA Tech Con, three individual one-day conferences as well each event is ticketed all the tickets are free, and the tickets go on sale, quote-unquote, 16th April. See you there.

[Rich, Thiago, Alessandra, Bruno and Antonia]
Hey, friends. Rich Heilman here, and I'm joined by Thomas Young behind the camera. And we're here in Sao Paulo, Brazil at the SAP offices, and we're doing an SAP CodJam today on Joule for Developers, ABAP Developers, having a lot of fun getting through the exercises. Once we go back, I'll show them some more fun stuff. And yeah, it's been a great time so far. And here's the rest of my friends from Brazil. What's up folks! There you are in the second part of the CodeJam Roadshow here in Brazil and Ale talks a little more. So, yesterday and today we are in São Paulo and tomorrow we will be in Londrina, Paraná. And in the coming days as well ... This Friday we're going to have two simultaneous events, one in Curitiba and the other in Ribeirão Preto. And after that, we will meet on Saturday in Campinas for the SAP Inside Track. Come join us.

[Tom]
Friend of the show, Oliver Graeff, recently posted about an upcoming free webinar called The Art and Science of SAPUI5 in SAP Build. This webinar on April the 15th, which we've offered twice that day to accommodate more time zones, We'll cover information about how to develop SAPUI5, Fiori, and all things UI inside the SAP Build environment. So if you're interested, check out the registration information and all the other details in the show notes. And while we're on the subject of user interfaces, Oliver also posted about recent updates to the UI5 and Fiori Roadmap Explorer. So what a better way to prepare for the upcoming webinar than to check out all the latest that's been published in the Roadmap Explorer.

[DJ]
We just wanted to let you know that there's a recent new series an expert session series over on the SAP Developers YouTube channel the topic is CAP Node.js and we have special guest Daniel Schlachter from the CAP enablement team there are three episodes so far you can watch the replays of those and subscribe to get notifications for the upcoming episodes in this series. See you online Fridays at the usual time in the chat for these expert session Premieres.

[Nora]
Did you know that you can use Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to build state-of-the-art AI agents with LangGraph? Now the cool thing is that AI Foundation has a lot of integrations with langchain. Now I'm going to show you how that works using the Python SDK. So up here you can see that I'm using the create_react_agent which is a pre-built AI agent from LangGraph and instead of using LangGraph to initialize the models as well, I'm going to use the Gen AI Hub SDK to initialize a model in a way that the LangGraph agent is going to understand it. So now over here you can see that I am here initializing my model. You can use any of the over 40 models that we have available in Generative AI Hub to power your agent here. So this is going to be your agent's brain, right? And then down here, when I actually initialize the actual create_react_agent from LangGraph, I'm going to hand over the LLM that I just initialized using Generative AI Hub. And then you can hand over any tools that you like. So here I'm, for example, using Playwright browser tools so that my agent can access the browser. But you can really use any tools you want and add them to your LangGraph agent here and try it out.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track NRW [Registration]
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

the agenda is complete, and we're moving into the second phase of preparations for the SAP Inside Track NRW (North Rhine-Westphalia).

SAP CodeJam

On June 12th, we'll kick things off with an SAP CodeJam at UNIORG (Lissaboner Allee 6-8, 44269 Dortmund) on the topic of “Latest ABAP Cloud and RAP Features”. You can find more information about the content and registration in the [SAP Community].

SAP Stammtisch

On the evening of June 12th, there will be an SAP Stammtisch in cooperation with Dortmund, Düsseldorf and Cologne. We invite all SAP CodeJam participants, as well as anyone interested, to join us. It starts at 6:00 PM at the Hövels Brewery (Hoher Wall 5-7, 44137 Dortmund) in Dortmund. We've reserved a separate room to foster a good atmosphere and encourage networking among all SAP colleagues.

SAP Inside Track

The SAP Inside Track itself starts on June 13th at adesso (Freie-Vogel-Straße 383, 44269 Dortmund) at 9:00 AM. You can find more details about the agenda and planned presentations below.

Register

You can register for the SAP Stammtisch, the SAP Inside Track, and the dinner via this registration. We look forward to your participation and interest.
